		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
    
  &lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;i&gt;&lt;b&gt;Requirements&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/i&gt; and &lt;i&gt;&lt;b&gt;Analysis &amp;amp; Design&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/i&gt; parts 
      were implemented separately and are used in this project as modules. In 
      current project these parts are read only. You may open modules for 
      editing: from module shortcut menu in Containment Tree choose command &lt;b&gt;
      Modules - Open Module As Project. &lt;/b&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;i&gt;&lt;b&gt;Requirements&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/i&gt;&lt;b&gt; &lt;/b&gt;module uses &lt;i&gt;&lt;b&gt;Use Case Description 
      Profile &lt;/b&gt;&lt;/i&gt;from MagicDraw precreated profiles.
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;i&gt;&lt;b&gt;Analysis and Design&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/i&gt;&lt;b&gt; &lt;/b&gt;module uses &lt;i&gt;&lt;b&gt;Generic DDL 
      Profile&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/i&gt; and &lt;i&gt;&lt;b&gt;UML Web Extensions Profile&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/i&gt; from 
      MagicDraw precreated profiles.
    &lt;/p&gt;
  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>

	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_10_0_8740266_1127378238953_560548_42'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='20'/>
				<style xmi:value='1'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>50, 50, 400, 40</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>Introduction</text>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_10_0_8740266_1127378238953_732667_46'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='12'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>50, 150, 632, 215</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
    
  &lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;font face=&quot;Times New Roman&quot; size=&quot;4&quot;&gt;Let&amp;#8217;s suppose that we have been 
      given an assignment from a university (let&amp;#8217;s name it &lt;i&gt;No Magic 
      University &amp;#8211; NMU)&lt;/i&gt; to develop software for its library system 
      (let&amp;#8217;s call the software &lt;i&gt;MagicLibrary&lt;/i&gt;). We will present an 
      informal description of the system, how it is understood by NMU. This 
      description will dictate the requirements for our software system. Then 
      we will move to modeling the system. &lt;/font&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;font face=&quot;Times New Roman&quot; size=&quot;4&quot;&gt;First, we will shortly discuss the 
      process, i.e. the modeling steps and their order. Then we will present 
      each type of the UML diagrams and show how they can be applied in 
      modeling process. &lt;/font&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
    &lt;/p&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      &lt;font face=&quot;Times New Roman&quot; size=&quot;4&quot;&gt;Note. The presented system is not 
      complete: the paper just shows how to use UML in modeling.&lt;/font&gt;
    &lt;/p&gt;
  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
	</mdElement>
